query:
SELECT 
                pi.store_path_hash,
                pi.store_path,
                pi.url,
                pi.compression,
                pi.nar_hash,
                pi.nar_size,
                pi.deriver,
                pi.ca
            FROM path_infos pi
            JOIN project_visible_paths pvp ON pvp.store_path_hash = pi.store_path_hash
            JOIN projects p ON p.id = pvp.project_id
            WHERE p.slug = ? AND pi.store_path_hash = ?
            LIMIT 1
